ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cattle_types" (
  "cattle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of cattle */,
  "cattle_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cattle type (e.g., Cow-calf, Backgrounder, Finisher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cattle type */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the cattle (e.g., 0-6 months) */,
  "growth_stage" TEXT /* Growth stage (e.g., calf, weaner, yearling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cattle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diets" (
  "diet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diet */,
  "diet_name" TEXT /* Name of the diet (e.g., All, Slow growth, Medium growth) */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate associated with the diet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diet */,
  "feed_composition" TEXT /* Composition of the diet (e.g., 50% barley, 30% corn) */,
  "nutritional_information" TEXT /* Nutritional information (e.g., protein: 15%, fat: 10%, fiber: 5%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "cattle_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of cattle */,
  "diet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diet */,
  "variable_cost_feed" TEXT /* Variable cost for feed (calculated or fixed) */,
  "variable_cost_other" REAL /* Variable cost for other expenses ($/day/animal) */,
  "fixed_cost" REAL /* Fixed cost ($/day/animal) */,
  "labour_cost" REAL /* Labour cost ($/day/animal) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the cost period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the cost period */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost for the period */,
  "external_data_source" TEXT /* External data source for cost updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_cattle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cattle_type_id") REFERENCES cattle_types ("cattle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_diet_id FOREIGN KEY ("diet_id") REFERENCES diets ("diet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_types" (
  "feed_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed type */,
  "feed_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feed type (e.g., Barley based, Corn based) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feed type */,
  "nutritional_value" TEXT /* Nutritional value of the feed type */,
  "supplier_information" TEXT /* Supplier information (e.g., supplier name, contact) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_costs" (
  "feed_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed cost record */,
  "feed_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feed type */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of feed */,
  "units_per_day" REAL /* Units of feed used per day */,
  "total_cost_per_day" REAL /* Total cost of feed per day */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the cost period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the cost period */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_costs_feed_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_type_id") REFERENCES feed_types ("feed_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "expense_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense (e.g., Veterinary, Medication) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "cost_per_day" REAL /* Cost of the expense per day */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the expense (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., cash, credit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixed_cost_items" (
  "fixed_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixed cost item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the fixed cost item (e.g., Housing, Equipment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fixed cost item */,
  "cost_per_day" REAL /* Cost of the fixed cost item per day */,
  "depreciation_rate" REAL /* Depreciation rate of the fixed cost item */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixed_cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labour_types" (
  "labour_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each labour type */,
  "labour_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the labour type (e.g., Feeding, Cleaning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the labour type */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level required for the labour type */,
  "training_required" INTEGER /* Whether training is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("labour_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labour_costs" (
  "labour_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each labour cost record */,
  "labour_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the labour type */,
  "hours_per_day" REAL /* Number of hours worked per day */,
  "cost_per_hour" REAL /* Cost per hour of labour */,
  "total_cost_per_day" REAL /* Total cost of labour per day */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the cost period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the cost period */,
  "training_cost" REAL /* Cost of training for the labour type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("labour_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labour_costs_labour_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("labour_type_id") REFERENCES labour_types ("labour_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Manager, Analyst, Staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
